site.name: Free Textbook Library
site.tagline: Textbooks belong to students, not paywalls.

integrations._comment: DEPRECATED: After Firebase migration, these Google integrations are no longer used. Kept for backward compatibility.

admin._comment: DEPRECATED: Authentication now handled by Firebase Auth. Admin credentials managed in Firebase Console.

hero.headline: A library for every student who needs a textbook.
hero.lead: Borrow, keep, or return — no fees, no fines, no questions. Browse the shelf, request a book, pick it up on campus.

how.title: How the library works
how.intro: No library card, no waitlist, no late fees. The whole point is friction-free access to the textbooks you need for the semester.

steps.title: Search the catalog
steps.desc: Filter by subject, title, author, or ISBN. If we have it, you'll see it listed as available.

steps.title: Request a book
steps.desc: Tap request, tell us who you are and how to reach you. A volunteer will email you within 48 hours.

steps.title: Pick it up
steps.desc: Drop by the library during open hours. Take the book, use it for as long as you need, return it when you're done — or don't. It's yours.

about.title: About the library
paragraphs: The Free Textbook Library started as a simple idea — students shouldn't have to choose between eating and buying a $300 biology textbook. We take donated books from graduating students, faculty, and community members, log them, and put them back into circulation.
Everything is volunteer-run. Every book is free. We don't track who has what or when it comes back. The only rule: when you're done, pass it on — either back to us or to another student who needs it.
If you have books to donate or want to volunteer with inventory, maintenance, or outreach, reach out through the contact form below.

ctaBanner.headline: Need a textbook?
ctaBanner.lead: The catalog is updated weekly by volunteers. Most requests are fulfilled within 48 hours.

catalog.title: The Catalog
catalog.lead: Every book currently on our shelf. Updated weekly by volunteers. Use the filters on the left to narrow by subject or search by title, author, or ISBN.
catalog.emptyMessage: No books match those filters. Try clearing a filter or broadening your search.

contact.location: Stern Student Center, College of Charleston

footer.tagline: A volunteer-run lending library for College of Charleston students. Free access, no fees, no questions.
footer.legal: © 2026 Free Textbook Library at the College of Charleston. A student-run initiative.
